title: tithymalus × pseudoesula
intro: Tithymalus × pseudoesula is a hybrid plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family, often referred to as a poisonous plant due to its toxic sap. The medicinal properties of Tithymalus × pseudoesula include its use as a purgative and emetic, which can aid in the treatment of digestive issues and relieve symptoms of fever. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to stimulate circulation, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic, although its use should be approached with caution due to its toxicity. Herbal preparations of Tithymalus × pseudoesula are typically made from its roots and have been used in traditional medicine, often in the form of tinctures, infusions, or decoctions.
